caption: A man wearing a green t-shirt and a matching green baseball cap sits in a studio setting. He is positioned in front of two professional microphones, one of which is closer to his face. He is speaking and gesturing with his left hand, which moves slightly throughout the sequence. Behind him, the background includes clothing displays with the text "UNIQUE FASHIONS" and a poster featuring another individual. To the right, a person wearing a blue garment is partially visible. Various logos appear on the screen, including a circular red and white logo on the left and a red logo that reads "STAR 20" on the right. On the wall in the background, there is a logo that says "VEM" above the words "VISUAL REALITY". The man's facial expression and hand position shift subtly as he continues to talk.
